name: Lighthouse Global Holdings Inc.
summary: Lighthouse Global Holdings Inc. focuses on holding a portfolio of assets. It acquires, invests, and collaborates companies in various industries, including project development, sharing economy platform, distributed ledger technology, green technology, big data and AI, and property management and hospitality. The company was formerly known as WMAC Holdings Corporation and changed its name to Lighthouse Global Holdings Inc. in May 2018. Lighthouse Global Holdings Inc. is headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada.
